data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding auto-start settings, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific setting. While the linked use case details various functionalities of the Zoom integration, it does not explicitly mention whether the auto-start settings are implemented or how they are configured. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: Auto-start settings (host must join first) not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
